apps.name: Todo Tide
apps.summary: Make color-coded lists, check things off, and keep a list on your Home Screen. No account, no ads — your tasks stay on your device.
intro: Todo Tide is a minimalist to-do app for people who want to capture a task and move on — no clutter, no accounts, no noise.
Built around a clean, monospaced design that quietly follows your system light or dark appearance, it stays out of the way so you can focus on what's actually on your list.

features.title: Multiple lists
features.description: Keep separate, color-coded lists for work, groceries, reading, travel, or anything else. Swipe between them, and tap to check things off. Completed tasks tuck away neatly and can be shown or cleared whenever you like.

features.title: Home Screen widget
features.description: Pin any list to your Home Screen so the things that matter are visible at a glance. Tap the widget to jump straight into that list.

features.title: Private by design
features.description: Everything lives on your device. There's no sign-up, no cloud account to manage, no analytics, and no tracking. Your tasks are yours.

features.title: Designed to be simple
features.description: Add a task in a tap and check it off when it's done. Reorder tasks and lists, color-code each one, and let the app follow your system light or dark appearance automatically.

screenshots.alt: Todo Tide lists overview with color-coded cards
A to-do list with tasks ready to check off

privacyPolicy.summary: Todo Tide does not collect, transmit, or share any personal data. Everything you create stays on your device.

sections.title: What we collect
body: Nothing. Todo Tide has no accounts, no sign-up, and no servers of its own. Your lists, tasks, and settings are stored locally on your device and, if you enable it, in your private iCloud account via Apple's standard system storage. We never see this data.
There is no analytics, no advertising SDK, no crash-reporting service, and no third-party tracking of any kind in the app.

sections.title: What we share
body: Because no data ever leaves your device to us, there is nothing for us to share or sell. We do not have access to your tasks and could not hand them to anyone even if asked.

sections.title: Your data, your control
body: You can delete any task, list, or the entire app at any time, which removes the associated data from your device. If you use iCloud, you can manage or remove that copy from your device's iCloud settings.

sections.title: Children's privacy
body: Todo Tide does not knowingly collect any information from anyone, including children under 13.

sections.title: Changes to this policy
body: If this policy ever changes, the updated version will be posted on this page with a new effective date.

sections.title: Contact
body: Questions about privacy in Todo Tide? Email sendtoshevvy@gmail.com.
